graphs together',
+ 'Packet identity and planting instructions use visual layout and context instead of basic local OCR alone',
+ 'Barcode, weight, lot, and packet dates receive dedicated analysis and evidence',
+ 'Weight-only packets no longer require a fake exact seed count',
+ 'Reserved seeds were removed from initial packet entry',
+ 'Succession instructions can offer a connected reminder after planting',
+ 'Exact official sources can verify and supplement packet information',
+ 'Only genuine missing or conflicting details require review'
 ];
diff -ruN '--exclude=node_modules' '--exclude=dist' '--exclude=package-lock.json' '--exclude=.github/workflows/phase46x3-export.yml' phase46x3base/test/seedPacketVision.test.js phase46x3current/test/seedPacketVision.test.js
--- phase46x3base/test/seedPacketVision.test.js	1970-01-01 00:00:00.000000000 +0000
+++ phase46x3current/test/seedPacketVision.test.js	2026-07-18 20:48:27.831764194 +0000
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+import test from 'node:test';import assert from 'node:assert/strict';
+import{validateSeedPacketAnalysis}from'../server/seedPacketSchema.js';
+import{mergeVisionPacketResult}from'../src/seedVisionMerge.js';
+const evidence=(value,sourceImage='front')=>({value,sourceImage,visibleEvidence:String(value),confidence:'high',printed:true,normalized:false});
+const fixture={analysisVersion:'seed-packet-vision-v1',packetIdentity:{brand:'Burpee',crop:'Lettuce',variety:'Iceberg A',productName:'Iceberg A Lettuce Seeds',category:'Vegetable',designations:['Heirloom'],notableClaims:[],colorDescription:null},inventory:{packetWeightValue:1,packetWeightUnit:'g',printedSeedCount:null,inventoryBasis:'weight',estimatedSeedCount:null,estimatedSeedCountSource:null,estimatedSeedCountConfidence:null,packetYear:null,packedForYear:null,sellByDate:null,purchasePrice:null},machineIdentifiers:{barcode:null,barcodeFormat:null,sku:null,catalogNumber:null,lotNumber:null,productCode:null,barcodeConfidence:null,barcodeMethod:'unavailable',checkDigitValid:null,visibleDigits:null},growing:{sunlight:'Full sun',daysToHarvest:65,daysToMaturity:null,maturityBasis:'sowing',emergenceMinimumDays:7,emergenceMaximumDays:10,germinationTemperatureMinimum:null,germinationTemperatureMaximum:null,plantingDepthValue:.25,plantingDepthUnit:'inch',thinningSpacingValue:4,thinningSpacingUnit:'inch',finalSpacingValue:null,finalSpacingUnit:null,rowSpacingValue:null,rowSpacingUnit:null,containerMinimumDiameterValue:12,containerMinimumDiameterUnit:'inch',plantsPerContainer:4,plantHeight:null,plantSpread:null,growthHabit:null,containerFriendly:true},instructions:{sowingMethod:'Direct sow',directSowGuidance:'Sow outdoors in early spring and again in late summer for a fall crop.',indoorStartGuidance:null,transplantGuidance:null,seasonalWindow:'Early spring and late summer',frostTiming:null,moistureGuidance:'Keep evenly moist throughout growth.',soilGuidance:'Sow in average, well-drained soil in full sun.',fertilizingGuidance:null,successionGuidance:'Sow every two weeks to extend the harvest.',harvestGuidance:'Harvest when heads are firm and full-sized.',regionalGuidance:null,warnings:[],treatmentInformation:null,seedSavingRestrictions:null,specialCare:null},automation:{successionRecommended:true,successionIntervalDays:14,successionReminderText:'Schedule the next Iceberg A sowing in 2 weeks.',successionReason:'Printed packet succession guidance',otherSuggestedReminders:[]},quality:{frontUsable:true,backUsable:true,packetIdentityConfidence:'high',overallConfidence:'high',exactIdentitySupportedByImages:true,manualReviewFields:['packetYear'],unreadableFields:['packetYear','lotNumber'],contradictoryFields:[],analysisNotes:[]},fieldEvidence:{brand:evidence('Burpee'),crop:evidence('Lettuce'),variety:evidence('Iceberg A'),productName:evidence('Iceberg A Lettuce Seeds'),category:evidence('Vegetable'),designations:evidence(['Heirloom']),packetWeightValue:evidence(1),inventoryBasis:evidence('weight'),sunlight:evidence('Full sun','back'),daysToHarvest:evidence(65,'back'),maturityBasis:evidence('sowing','back'),emergenceMinimumDays:evidence(7,'back'),emergenceMaximumDays:evidence(10,'back'),plantingDepthValue:evidence(.25,'back'),plantingDepthUnit:evidence('inch','back'),thinningSpacingValue:evidence(4,'back'),thinningSpacingUnit:evidence('inch','back'),containerMinimumDiameterValue:evidence(12,'back'),containerMinimumDiameterUnit:evidence('inch','back'),plantsPerContainer:evidence(4,'back'),containerFriendly:evidence(true,'back'),sowingMethod:evidence('Direct sow','back'),directSowGuidance:evidence('Sow outdoors in early spring and again in late summer for a fall crop.','back'),seasonalWindow:evidence('Early spring and late summer','back'),moistureGuidance:evidence('Keep evenly moist throughout growth.','back'),soilGuidance:evidence('Sow in average, well-drained soil in full sun.','back'),successionGuidance:evidence('Sow every two weeks to extend the harvest.','back'),harvestGuidance:evidence('Harvest when heads are firm and full-sized.','back'),successionRecommended:evidence(true,'back'),successionIntervalDays:evidence(14,'back'),successionReminderText:evidence('Schedule the next Iceberg A sowing in 2 weeks.','back'),successionReason:evidence('Printed packet succession guidance','back')},rawVisibleText:{front:'BURPEE LETTUCE Iceberg A VEGETABLE HEIRLOOM 1 g',back:'FULL SUN 65 DAYS 1/4 INCH 7-10 DAYS'},warnings:[]};
+test('Iceberg A structured vision fixture validates',()=>assert.equal(validateSeedPacketAnalysis(fixture).packetIdentity.variety,'Iceberg A'));
+test('vision merge preserves manual correction and weight-only inventory',()=>{const result=mergeVisionPacketResult({brand:'My correction',fieldMeta:{brand:{source:'manual',manuallyCorrected:true}},reservedQuantity:9},{analysis:fixture,model:'gpt-5-mini',analyzedAt:new Date().toISOString(),requestId:'req',imageHashes:{front:'a',back:'b'},analysisPassCount:1});assert.equal(result.draft.brand,'My correction');assert.equal(result.draft.variety,'Iceberg A');assert.equal(result.draft.countType,'weight-only');assert.equal(result.draft.reservedQuantity,0);assert.equal(result.draft.packetIntelligence.automation.successionIntervalDays,14)});
+test('malformed identity is rejected',()=>assert.throws(()=>validateSeedPacketAnalysis({...fixture,packetIdentity:{...fixture.packetIdentity,variety:'Iceberg A FULL SUN'}})));
